reviews.review_text: Seller did not disclose a touched-up quarter-panel dent and downplayed overdue maintenance.
revealed_facts: Quarter-panel dent on rear passenger side approximately 3 inches in diameter, touched up but visible under direct light
Oil change overdue by 4,200 miles; last documented service at 68,500 miles

reviews.review_text: The seller described the car as pristine, but there was a small coffee stain on the rear seat that wasn't mentioned.
revealed_facts: Small coffee stain on rear seat fabric, approximately 2 inches in diameter, mostly hidden by seat crease

reviews.review_text: The seller was mostly honest about the car's condition, though initial descriptions were slightly optimistic, and the minor interior wear was disclosed after a specific question.
revealed_facts: Driver seat bolster has minor wear and slight fabric pilling from entry/exit

reviews.review_text: The seller misrepresented the truck's condition by not disclosing a body dent and actively downplayed overdue transmission maintenance.
revealed_facts: Quarter-sized dent on passenger rear fender with minor paint cracking, not visible in listing photos
Transmission fluid service overdue by 18,000 miles; last changed at 61,000 instead of recommended 45,000-mile intervals

reviews.review_text: The car had an undisclosed minor interior cosmetic defect (small cigarette burn) that was not mentioned in the listing or conversation.
revealed_facts: Small cigarette burn on rear passenger seat fabric, approximately 1cm diameter, partially hidden by seat crease

reviews.review_text: The seller actively misrepresented the car's true mileage and concealed significant accident damage and major mechanical issues in the engine and transmission. Do not trust their descriptions.
revealed_facts: Odometer rolled back from 127,000 miles; previous owner was a rideshare driver who put on excessive highway miles before selling to auction
MT-82 manual transmission exhibits grinding when engaging 2nd and 3rd gears; synchros are worn and will require rebuild within 10,000 miles
Rear passenger side quarter panel has been replaced after collision; paint match is slightly off and body lines don't align perfectly with trunk lid
Coyote V8 has developed a ticking noise from the right bank valve train; likely needs cam phaser replacement which is a known issue on high-mileage examples
